title: Extremely Optimized
description: A lightweight modpack made for those with a low-end pc, made with only optimizing mods, without QOL mods!
body:
# Extremely Optimized is a modpack created aiming to reach the limits of FPS in its gameplay.

Containing only mods that will help with this, without mods that adds animals, biomes, buildings, etc. I intend to update with new optimization mods whenever possible, so please help me by sending feedback and opinions!

> Disclaimer: this is my first optimization modpack so it may have some issues with configuration on the first versions!!







* Download my another modpack, [BetterCraft+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bettercraft+)
